title: OpenAI Codex CLI Added App Handoff, PAT, And Plugin JSON Contracts
summary: OpenAI's Codex CLI 0.138 changelog records CLI-to-desktop app handoff, saved image file-path exposure, model-defined reasoning effort ordering, account token usage reads for app-server integrations, v2 personal access token support, and richer structured plugin command output.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official Codex changelog reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Audit integrations that depend on Codex app-server auth, token usage reads, plugin JSON output, remote MCP metadata, image file references, or CLI-to-desktop handoff before relying on 0.138 behavior.
Retest goal workflows and terminal/app handoff on macOS and Windows if local automation assumes older CLI-only behavior.

changed_parameters: codex app-server account token usage reads
plugin add/remove and marketplace JSON output
plugin detail default prompts, remote MCP servers, and unavailable app templates
local image file-path exposure to the model

limitations: APW records Codex CLI and app-server contract changes from the public changelog; it does not assert broader OpenAI API contract changes outside Codex surfaces.
No raw changelog body is copied into the event.
